Ruomeng Liu
Home // Research // CV

Ruomeng Liu (pronunciation: /ʐwɔ.məŋ ljoʊ/) is an M.Phil. candidate in Communication at the University of Hong Kong (HKU), supervised by Prof. King-wa Fu. Before that, he completed a Bachelors’s degree in Journalism at University of Chinese Academy of Social Sciences in 2024, advised by Prof. Fen Xiang.

Broadly I investigate how people make decisions in high-choice media environments (and its political consequences). I am interested in computational social sciences and cognitive science.

E-mail: ruomeng.6@connect.hku.hk
